\tzpentry{ID5715}{Theory It Trawin Topology Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5715 introduces Theory It Trawin Topology Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} V_{\Sph^3} = 2\pi^2 R^3 \approx 4.4 \times 10^{79} \text{ m}^3 \end{equation}
